title: No Title
summary: The Hearst Foundations is a national philanthropic organization that identifies and funds outstanding nonprofits to support people of all backgrounds in the United States.
llm_eligibility: The Hearst Foundations seek to identify best-in-class organizations through the online application process, consensus-building team review of each applicant, financial due diligence and site visits. They look for evidence of sustainability beyond their support.
emails: support.ny@hearstfdn.org; hearst.sf@hearstfdn.org; support.sf@hearstfdn.org; hearst.ny@hearstfdn.org; ahepler@hearstfdn.org; mcedeno@hearstfdn.org
